title: Edan Base
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Edan Base''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on [[Edan II/Legends|Edan II]]. It was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but was restored to Rebel control when they recaptured the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], defeating the Imperial [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] natives [[Teles Jalahafi]] and [[Shela Jalahafi]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Introductory Adventure Game]]''
